data.title: Paradex to Refund $650,000 After Maintenance Glitch Causes Liquidation
data.description:
Paradex has announced plans to refund $650,000 to 200 users following a maintenance glitch that led to liquidation events. According to PANews, the issue arose during a scheduled 30-minute database upgrade on January 19, when unexpected problems occurred. A race condition during critical data operations caused corrupted data to be saved to the cloud and published on the Paradex Chain. This resulted in some market funding indices being reset to zero, causing abnormal gains and losses and triggering liquidations across multiple markets.

In response, Paradex temporarily suspended platform access, canceled all open orders except for take-profit and stop-loss orders, and rolled back the blockchain to a snapshot taken before the maintenance window began. Previously, Paradex had been temporarily unavailable due to the rollback of the chain state during database maintenance.

data.title: Polygon Labs to acquire Coinme and Sequence for $250M to advance Open Money Stack
data.description:
Polygon Labs is acquiring Coinme and Sequence for $250M to integrate wallet, fiat onramp, and cross-chain tools into its Open Money Stack for global payments.
source: https://catenaa.com/polygon-labs-to-acquire-coinme-and-sequence-for-250m-to-advance-open-money-stack/

data.title: Bitcoin spot ETFs saw a total net outflow of $104 million yesterday, marking the fifth consecutive day of net outflows.
data.description: According to SoSoValue data, Bitcoin spot ETFs saw a total net outflow of $104 million yesterday (January 23rd, Eastern Time). The BlackRock ETF (IBIT) experienced the largest single-day net outflow, at $102 million, bringing its historical total net inflow to $62.903 billion. The Fidelity ETF (FBTC) followed with a net outflow of $1.9473 million, bringing its historical total net inflow to $11.465 billion. As of press time, the total net asset value of Bitcoin spot ETFs was $115.883 billion, with an ETF net asset value ratio (market capitalization as a percentage of Bitcoin's total market capitalization) of 6.48%, and a historical cumulative net inflow of $56.495 billion.

data.title: Ethereum spot ETFs saw a total net outflow of $41.7358 million yesterday, marking the fourth consecutive day of net outflows.
data.description: According to SoSoValue data, Ethereum spot ETFs saw a total net outflow of $41.7358 million yesterday (January 23rd, Eastern Time). The Ethereum spot ETF with the largest single-day net inflow was the Grayscale Ethereum Mini Trust ETF (ETH), with a net inflow of $9.1571 million, bringing ETH's historical total net inflow to $1.643 billion. This was followed by the Fidelity ETF (FETH), with a net inflow of $4.3963 million, bringing FETH's historical total net inflow to $2.591 billion. The Ethereum spot ETF with the largest single-day net outflow was the BlackRock ETF (ETHA), with a net outflow of $44.4925 million, bringing ETHA's historical total net inflow to $12.506 billion. As of press time, the total net asset value of the Ethereum spot ETF is $17.702 billion, the ETF net asset ratio (market capitalization as a percentage of Ethereum's total market capitalization) is 4.99%, and the historical cumulative net inflow has reached $12.302 billion.

data.title: Ethereum's Market Behavior Indicates Lack of Aggressive Buying
data.description:
CyrilXBT posted on X. Ethereum (ETH) is currently exhibiting a weaker market structure, with recent price bounces appearing corrective rather than impulsive. Despite being positioned in a higher-timeframe demand zone, there is a noticeable lack of aggressive buying activity. This typically suggests that the market is not yet prepared to shift risk
source: https://www.binance.com/en/square/post/35498200914545?utm_source=BinanceNewsRSS

data.title: Ethereum Poised to Benefit from Asset Tokenization, Says Liquid Capital Founder
data.description:
On January 24, Liquid Capital founder Yi Lihua shared insights from BlackRock's 2026 thematic outlook report, highlighting Ethereum's potential as a key beneficiary of asset tokenization. According to BlockBeats, approximately 65% of tokenized assets are currently deployed on the Ethereum network. Yi Lihua emphasized that the globalization of stablecoins and the integration of finance onto blockchain are significant opportunities for Ethereum. He noted that short-term fluctuations are a normal part of the process, and his recent efforts have focused on buying more Ethereum during dips and actively participating in various Ethereum capital platforms to help them expand and reinvest in Ethereum
source: https://www.binance.com/en/square/post/35500761976146?utm_source=BinanceNewsRSS

data.title: Ethereum Poised to Benefit from Asset Tokenization, Says Liquid Capital Founder
data.description: On January 24, Liquid Capital founder Yi Lihua shared insights from BlackRock's 2026 thematic outlook report, highlighting Ethereum's potential as a key beneficiary of asset tokenization. According to BlockBeats, approximately 65% of tokenized assets are currently deployed on the Ethereum network.Yi Lihua emphasized that the globalization of stablecoins and the integration of finance onto blockchain are significant opportunities for Ethereum. He noted that short-term fluctuations are a normal part of the process, and his recent efforts have focused on buying more Ethereum during dips and actively participating in various Ethereum capital platforms to help them expand and reinvest in Ethereum. He believes that practical efforts and a bullish approach will yield substantial results in the long run.

data.title: Ethereum's Market Behavior Indicates Lack of Aggressive Buying
data.description: CyrilXBT posted on X. Ethereum (ETH) is currently exhibiting a weaker market structure, with recent price bounces appearing corrective rather than impulsive. Despite being positioned in a higher-timeframe demand zone, there is a noticeable lack of aggressive buying activity. This typically suggests that the market is not yet prepared to shift risk. Historically, when Ethereum takes the lead, its impact is more pronounced.

data.description:

source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/gamestop-moves-bitcoin-signaling-potential-sale?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: A whale deposited 1,999 ETH into a CEX at an average price of $3,873, resulting in a total unrealized loss of over $5.2 million.
data.description: According to on-chain data analyst @ai_9684xtpa, a whale that bought Ethereum from $4479 to $2813, and then bought 6411.4 ETH at an average price of $3873 at last year's high, started cutting its losses 8 hours ago. The whale deposited 1999 ETH (approximately $5.928 million) into the exchange, and if it sells, it will lose $1.815 million (deposit price $2965.7). Currently, the remaining 3803 ETH are still showing a floating loss of $3.457 million.

data.title: Buidlpad launches the second phase of its Buidlpad Vault time deposit product, offering a fixed return of 8%.
data.description: Buidlpad has announced the launch of the second phase of its DeFi term deposit product, Buidlpad Vault, offering a fixed yield of 8%. This phase of deposits will open at 8:00 AM UTC on January 25th, supporting ETH and USDT on Ethereum and BNB and USDT on BSC, with a quota of $20 million.

data.title: XRP Showing Strength, Analyst Points To $4 Potential
data.description:
XRP has begun attracting attention again after months of sideways trading. The coin has risen slightly over the past day, though it remains down for the week. Traders are pointing to familiar chart patterns, suggesting the quiet period may be nearing an end. Related Reading: Bitcoin’s Sharp Reversal Leaves Over $800 Million Liquidated In 1 Day Traders Spot A Familiar Price Pattern A fresh take on XRP came from DonWedge, who posted a half-day chart on TradingView
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/altcoin/xrp-showing-strength-analyst-points-to-4-potential/

data.title: OKX Star: Will promote diversified services and expand on-chain assets and payment scenarios within the global regulatory framework.
data.description: According to official sources, at the OKX New Year's Eve dinner event on January 24th, OKX founder and CEO Star delivered a speech, stating that OKX will shoulder more industry responsibility and continue to provide more diversified, user-friendly, and convenient financial services within the global regulatory framework. Regarding ecosystem development, OKX will continue to promote the on-chaining of more assets, covering cross-chain assets and real-world assets such as RWA, making X Layer and the OKX Web3 wallet important carriers of various asset types and core entry points for users to enter the on-chain world. Furthermore, OKX Pay payment services will continue to be upgraded, aiming to lower the barriers to Web3 usage and promote the practical application of crypto payments.

data.title: The British man implicated in the Qian Zhimin case, labeled a "professional money launderer," has been ordered to pay a $7.6 million fine or face an additional eight years in prison.
data.description: The Crown Prosecution Service (CPS) has ordered Sen Hok Ling, a key intermediary in the Zhimin Qian Bitcoin fraud case and known as a "professional money launderer," to pay £5 million (approximately US$7.6 million) to British authorities within three months, or face up to eight years in prison. The CPS stated that Ling assisted convicted fraudster Zhimin Qian (also known as Yadi Zhang) in transferring funds. Between February and April 2024, Ling received 83.7 bitcoins and cashed them out through UAE bank accounts and third-party channels. Ling pleaded guilty to one count of money laundering in November 2025 and was sentenced to four years and 11 months in prison. Zhimin Qian was sentenced to 11 years and 8 months on two counts of money laundering. Furthermore, regarding the final disposal of the 61,000 bitcoins under Qian Zhimin's name (the largest seizure of crypto assets in UK history), related civil proceedings are still ongoing. Future funds may be partially used to compensate victims, with the remainder potentially going to the UK Treasury. (Decrypt)

data.title: The US Solana spot ETF saw a net inflow of $1.87 million in a single day.
data.description: According to SoSoValue data, the Solana spot ETF saw a total net inflow of $1.87 million yesterday (January 23rd, Eastern Time). Only the Fidelity SOL ETF (FSOL) saw net inflows yesterday (January 23rd, Eastern Time), with a single-day net inflow of $1.87 million and a historical total net inflow of $148 million. As of press time, the Solana spot ETF has a total net asset value of $1.08 billion, a net asset value ratio of 1.50%, and a historical cumulative net inflow of $873 million.

data.title: OKX Star: The Crypto Industry is Entering a Long-Term Development Stage and Moving Towards Compliance and Maturity
data.description: According to official sources, on January 24th, OKX founder and CEO Stephen Star stated at a New Year's Eve dinner event hosted by OKX that since 2017, global regulatory agencies have been paying increasing attention to the industry, and the industry as a whole is shifting from its early "wild growth" to compliance and sustainable development. Star pointed out that young people born in the 1990s, 1995s, and 2000s are becoming a significant force in the cryptocurrency market, and their acceptance of asset transparency, self-custody, and technology-driven finance is reshaping global financial perceptions. He also called on industry practitioners and content creators to stay away from noise, adhere to technology-driven approaches and long-termism, and jointly safeguard the industry's reputation.
